name: Omega-3 fatty acids
summary: Decision-ready summary: Omega-3 fatty acids is best framed for triglyceride reduction; cardiovascular support; inflammation modulation; safety screen: bleeding disorder; anticoagulants at high dose; fish allergy.
description: Omega-3 fatty acids supports cardio; triglycerides; inflammation with high confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
